hardware_assumptions.source: user-provided; all throughput, memory and kernel support remain runtime gates

architecture_relevant_findings: Enformer, Borzoi and AlphaGenome support multiscale compression with base- or fine-resolution decoding for long sequence-to-function tasks.
Evo 2 and HyenaDNA support single-base long-context sequence operators but at compute scales or domains that cannot be copied directly.
Caduceus and PlantCaduceus support explicit bidirectionality and reverse-complement treatment.
The Nature Communications benchmark shows that foundation models do not automatically beat simple supervised baselines, requiring matched external comparators and leakage-safe splits.

must_have: one continuous optimizer/checkpoint lineage across synchronized mixed-length batches
measured H20 memory and throughput gates before freezing the kernel
decision_boundary.primary_candidate: hierarchical single-base encoder-decoder with 128-bp latent stride, a bidirectional Mamba-2 global core, and whole-model reverse-complement conjoining
decision_boundary.required_comparator: HyenaDNA/Hyena long-convolution operator under the same parameter, token and context budgets
rejected_without_spike: the revoked local convolution plus global-mean mixer
claiming Mamba-2 support from paper evidence without compiling and profiling the actual H20 stack
four full-resolution scans per block from directly stacking Caduceus RCPS and bidirectional wrappers at 262144 bases

observations: The published BiMamba wrapper runs forward and reversed Mamba streams and can tie their input/output projections.
The RCPS wrapper doubles representation channels and applies the same submodule to forward and reverse-complement streams.
The released model imports the original Mamba operator; replacing it with Mamba-2 is a new implementation rather than a verified drop-in scientific result.
The audited Mamba2 class defaults to d_state=128, expand=2, headdim=64 and chunk_size=256.
Its fused training path calls the Triton SSD chunk-scan kernels, so CUDA, Triton, causal-conv1d and H20 compatibility are runtime gates.
The official implementation exposes tensor/sequence parallel options, but this project must first verify ordinary DDP and exact mixed-length semantics on two and three H20 GPUs.

architecture_boundary.base_resolution: one nucleotide per input token and one nucleotide per MLM output
architecture_boundary.local_path: multiscale convolutional encoder-decoder with base-resolution skip features
architecture_boundary.reverse_complement_contract: average forward logits with reverse-complement-aligned logits from the same complete backbone
architecture_boundary.reason: At 256K bases, hierarchy retains base-resolution labels while avoiding repeated full-width state-space scans in every deep global block.
freeze_blockers: exact trainable parameter count from the implemented model
Mamba-2 build and numerical smoke on the target H20 software stack
BF16 forward/backward/optimizer memory and throughput at every formal context
two-GPU and three-GPU synchronized length-bucket DDP tests
comparison with an equal-budget Hyena global operator before one kernel is frozen

papers.title: Transformers are SSMs: Generalized Models and Efficient Algorithms Through Structured State Space Duality
papers.evidence: Mamba-2/SSD supplies the main linear-time operator candidate and reports a 2-8x core-layer speedup over Mamba while retaining language-model quality.
papers.limitation: The paper does not validate this repository, DNA reverse-complement semantics, 256K mixed-length training, or the target H20 software stack.

papers.title: Mamba: Linear-Time Sequence Modeling with Selective State Spaces
papers.evidence: Selective state spaces provide content-dependent propagation with linear sequence scaling and demonstrated genomics applicability up to million-length sequences.
papers.limitation: The base Mamba block is directional and does not by itself enforce DNA reverse-complement equivariance.

papers.title: Caduceus: Bi-Directional Equivariant Long-Range DNA Sequence Modeling
papers.evidence: BiMamba and MambaDNA directly address bidirectionality and reverse-complement equivariance; Caduceus reports gains on long-range variant-effect prediction.
papers.limitation: Its published implementation is based on the Mamba generation available at the time; a Mamba-2 substitution must be treated as a new implementation and tested.

papers.title: HyenaDNA: Long-Range Genomic Sequence Modeling at Single Nucleotide Resolution
papers.evidence: Demonstrates single-nucleotide genomic pretraining up to one million tokens with subquadratic long convolutions and strong genomic benchmarks.
papers.limitation: Human-reference pretraining and its reported task suite do not establish crop cross-species generalization or H20 efficiency.

papers.title: Hyena Hierarchy: Towards Larger Convolutional Language Models
papers.evidence: Implicit long convolutions plus data-controlled gating provide a subquadratic alternative with reported efficiency advantages at 64K.
papers.limitation: The efficiency claims are hardware and implementation dependent and must be re-profiled at 128K/256K on H20.
